get.description: JSON endpoint returning reservations grouped by room and errors.

post.description: Shift all reservation dates forward/backward by the specified number of days.
Query the LLM for all information about a given guest.

Extract a guest name from a multimedia file (image or audio).

For images:
- If crop coordinates are provided (non-zero crop_w), the image is cropped first.

For audio:
- The entire file is sent to the audio-capable LLM.

If model_id is provided, uses that specific model for extraction.
Otherwise, falls back to the default configured model.

post.description:
Create a new LLM model.

get.description: Get a single LLM model by ID.

put.description:
Update an existing LLM model.

All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description:
Delete an LLM model.

Prevents deletion if the model is still referenced by any prompt version.

post.description:
Fetch live model info from a raw endpoint URL.

Accepts a JSON body with:
  models_endpoint (optional) — the full /v1/models URL, or a base URL (e.g. /v1)
  endpoint (required if models_endpoint missing) — base URL, appends /v1/models

get.description:
Fetch live model info from the LLM endpoint.

Hits the {models_endpoint} (or /v1/models) on the model's base URL
to discover what the model actually reports.
List all prompt groups.

post.description: Create a new prompt group with optional items.

get.description: Get a single prompt group with all details.

put.description: Update group name, description, and/or items.

delete.description: Delete a prompt group and all related data.

patch.description: Toggle the active state of a prompt group.
Toggle the active state of a single prompt group item.

post.description: Execute the prompt chain now (Recalculate Now).

Execute chain with user inputs (page mode).

The first step receives user_inputs as template variables.
Subsequent steps receive the output of their predecessor via chain results.

Execute a single step in a prompt chain (page mode, step-by-step).

Accepts both JSON body and multipart/form-data:

JSON body (no file):
```json
{
  "position": 1,
  "inputs": {"customer_name": "John"},
  "initial_input": "",
  "accumulated_context": ""
}
```

Form data (with file):
- position: Step position (1-based)
- initial_input: Raw text for the first step
- accumulated_context: Context from previous steps
- inputs_json: JSON string of {field: value} inputs
- file: Optional image or audio file for multimodal input
Schedule a prompt chain execution at a specific time.

delete.description: Cancel a specific schedule for a group.

get.description: Get execution history for a group.

delete.description: Clear all active schedules for a group.

get.description: Download a result file for a specific execution result.

post.description: Test a specific tool call directly to verify database connectivity.

Test the LLM completion endpoint directly with tool calling.

Uses response_cache wrapper for diagnostic logging. To enable:
- Edit response_cache.py and set log_level="DEBUG" for verbose output
- Set log_level="INFO" for summary diagnostics only

post.description: Remove all expired HTTP cache entries.

Shift all reservation check_in and check_out dates by a given number
of days (default: 1).

    {"days": 3}   – shift forward by 3 days
    {"days": -2}  – shift backward by 2 days
